sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ مُهِمَّةً جِدًّا فِي حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni su postali veoma važni u našem svakodnevnom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones have become very important in our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُهَا لِلتَّحَدُّثِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَتَصَفُّحِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ih za razgovor s prijateljima i pretraživanje interneta.
sentences.translationEn: We use them to talk with friends and browse the internet.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةُ فِي الْعُثُورِ عَلَى الْمَعْلُومَاتِ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovi uređaji nam pomažu da brzo pronađemo informacije.
sentences.translationEn: These devices help us find information quickly.

sentences.arabic: يَحْمِلُ كُلُّ شَخْصٍ حَاسُوبًا صَغِيرًا فِي جَيْبِهِ الْآنَ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba sada nosi mali računar u svom džepu.
sentences.translationEn: Every person carries a small computer in their pocket now.
